mapper.update: UPDATE player p JOIN ( SELECT gbl.player_name AS name, CASE gbl.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g.away_team ELSE g.home_team END AS team, SUM(gbl.at_bats) AS ab, SUM(gbl.hits) AS h, SUM(gbl.rbi) AS rbi, COUNT(DISTINCT gbl.game_id) AS games FROM game_batter_log gbl JOIN game g ON g.id = gbl.game_id GROUP BY gbl.player_name, team ) batter_agg ON p.name = batter_agg.name AND p.team = batter_agg.team LEFT JOIN ( SELECT gbl_hr.player_name, CASE gbl_hr.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g_hr.away_team ELSE g_hr.home_team END AS team, COUNT(*) AS hr_count FROM game_batter_log gbl_hr JOIN JSON_TABLE(gbl_hr.inning_results, '$[*]' COLUMNS (val VARCHAR(20) PATH '$')) jt ON jt.val LIKE '%홈%' JOIN game g_hr ON g_hr.id = gbl_hr.game_id GROUP BY gbl_hr.player_name, team ) hr_agg ON hr_agg.player_name = p.name AND hr_agg.team = p.team SET p.at_bats = batter_agg.ab, p.hits = batter_agg.h, p.rbi = batter_agg.rbi, p.games = batter_agg.games, p.home_runs = COALESCE(hr_agg.hr_count, 0), p.batting_avg = CASE WHEN batter_agg.ab > 0 THEN ROUND(batter_agg.h / batter_agg.ab, 3) ELSE NULL END WHERE p.player_type = 'BATTER'

UPDATE player p JOIN ( SELECT gpl.player_name AS name, CASE gpl.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g.away_team ELSE g.home_team END AS team, SUM(gpl.innings_pitched_outs) AS total_outs, SUM(gpl.earned_runs) AS er, SUM(CASE WHEN gpl.result = 'WIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN gpl.result = 'SAVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saves, SUM(CASE WHEN gpl.result = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS holds, COUNT(DISTINCT gpl.game_id) AS games FROM game_pitcher_log gpl JOIN game g ON g.id = gpl.game_id GROUP BY gpl.player_name, team ) agg ON p.name = agg.name AND p.team = agg.team SET p.innings_pitched_outs = agg.total_outs, p.wins = agg.wins, p.saves = agg.saves, p.holds = agg.holds, p.games = agg.games, p.era = CASE WHEN agg.total_outs > 0 THEN ROUND(agg.er * 27.0 / agg.total_outs, 2) ELSE NULL END WHERE p.player_type = 'PITCHER'
